title: dryopteris hispiduliformis
intro: Dryopteris hispiduliformis, also known as hispid fern or hispid-leafed wood fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the genus Dryopteris and is native to East Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic activities. The health benefits of Dryopteris hispiduliformis include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, as well as being used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various health conditions.
